strategy: Small Storm boss (2,320) with Spirit, Mind, and Body Bowl minions. Nothing here stops a straightforward blade-and-hit.
Each round he beckons Hamakala for 100 Balance damage to all wizards, minor chip. Strangle dispels it if you want, otherwise heal through it.
Blade up and AoE the bowls down with him.
cheatNotes: Each round he pings the whole team for 100 Balance damage. It is small; heal through it or Strangle it away.
Though it is not a normal cast, Strangle can dispel this 100-damage beckon if it bothers you.
